title: Momentum
summary: 9709 Mechanics — momentum, impulse, conservation in collisions with PhET collision lab.
learningObjectives: Apply conservation of momentum in one dimension.

simpleExplanation.title: p = mv
simpleExplanation.summary: Momentum is conserved when no external impulse acts. Impulse equals change in momentum and equals force × time.
steps: Total p before = total p after (closed system).
Elastic: KE conserved; inelastic: objects may coalesce.
Explosion from rest: momenta equal and opposite.

sections.content: **Momentum** (4.3) links to **Newton's laws** (4.4). Take **direction** into account — use signed velocities on a line.
